extraction.one_line_summary: KWIATKOWSKI attacked on the penultimate gravel sector using a stealth drift move, soloing to victory with 2km of gravel remaining.
tactical_patterns: KWIATKOWSKI used a deliberate drift to left side of gravel sector to mask acceleration, gaining critical initial gap.
Sky drove tempo on gravel approaches to isolate race favorites before KWIATKOWSKI's decisive move with two sectors remaining.
Final gravel sectors produce winning moves at Strade when tempo fractures group to 7-8 riders before selection.

rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michał: positive: demonstrated superior gravel sector positioning sense, choosing left line to launch stealth acceleration that opponents failed to cover
rider_signals.VAN AVERMAET Greg: negative: second place again reveals inability to respond to acceleration on final gravel sectors despite strong positioning
rider_signals.WELLENS Tim: positive: first podium at Strade indicates improved form on late-race gravel climbs compared to previous editions
rider_signals.ŠTYBAR Zdeněk: negative: fourth place with visible frustration suggests declining ability to close gaps on final gravel despite Classics pedigree
